title: Industrial Automation
summary: An AI research lab working vertically on industrial technology. We are deeply curious to see what curiosity does to humanity.
heroSub: We are building the vertical layer for industrial autonomy. A research lab driven by the curiosity of what is possible when intelligence meets the physical world.

stripItems.title: Vertical Focus

stripItems.title: Autonomy

stripItems.title: Curiosity
